summary: Expanded source review: 6 new sources consulted. Two grades revised. Gas tax suspension added.

changes.reason: Canadian Climate Institute finds Canada on track for half of required 2030 reduction. Industrial carbon credits trade at ~$20/t despite $95 headline. ECCC losing 840+ positions. PM acknowledged targets will be missed.

Policy Options documented cooperative federalism failures. 40K public service cuts while pursuing ambitious delivery agenda. Intergovernmental coordination mechanisms too weak for nation-building agenda.
changes.rubricRef: C- Range: effort questionable, measurable impact minimal

changes.text: Gas tax suspension announced April 14 (same day as majority win). Federal fuel excise suspended Apr 14 – Sep 7, costing $2.4B in revenue. La Presse: "une décision insensée."
Source stack expanded: added Canadian Climate Institute, IFSD, IRPP/Policy Options, La Presse, Toronto Star, National Observer, The Conversation Canada.
Carney wins majority government (174 seats) via 3 byelection wins on April 13, 2026.
